name: wsws
description: The production-grade framework for orchestrating human commute pipelines.

scripts.wake: echo '⏰ Wake phase initiated. Alarm fired. Retry policy: exponential backoff (base 5m, max 3 retries).' && sleep 2 && echo '👁️ Eyes open >3s. Feet on floor. Wake phase complete.'
scripts.shower: echo '🚿 Shower phase initiated. Single attempt — no retries.' && sleep 2 && echo '🌡️ Temperature converged via binary search. existentialStare sub-phase complete. Shower phase complete.'
scripts.walk: echo '🚶 Walk phase initiated. Checking weather provider...' && sleep 1 && echo '☀️ Clear conditions. Default strategy selected.' && sleep 2 && echo '📍 Arrived at destination. Walk phase complete.'
scripts.sit: echo '💺 Sit phase initiated. Scanning for available desk...' && sleep 1 && echo '💻 Desk acquired. Laptop open. Slack status: green. Sit phase complete.'
scripts.commute: npm run wake && npm run shower && npm run walk && npm run sit && echo '\n✅ Pipeline complete. All phases succeeded.'
scripts.commute:pro: npm run commute && echo '\n🌙 WSWSWS Pro: Evening phases queued. ETA: end of workday.'
scripts.status:
echo '📊 WSWS Pipeline Status
  Wake:   ✓ Complete
  Shower: ✓ Complete
  Walk:   ✓ Complete
  Sit:    ✓ Complete (current phase)
  Alertness: 74/100
  Energy: 61/100
  Hydration: 55/100 — consider hydrating'
scripts.snooze: echo '😴 Snooze invoked. Retry attempt logged. Backing off...' && sleep 3 && echo '⏰ Alarm re-fired. Please run npm run wake to retry.'
scripts.hydrate: echo '💧 Hydration middleware executed. Hydration: 55 → 80/100. Continue working.'

author: WSWS Framework Contributors
